lines.speaker: Factory Manager
lines.text: Don't bother me, can't you see I'm busy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I can't... can I go into the factory?

lines.speaker: Factory Manager
lines.text: You can go in. The Consortium, in their infinite wisdom, has decided to open up the factory to all and sundry.

lines.speaker: Factory Manager
lines.text: We've built a new blast furnace and always have a shortage of people to work on it.

lines.speaker: Factory Manager
lines.text: Just don't go causing any trouble, I still run this factory!
